caption:
Google has introduced three new Gemini models, each designed to enhance speed, efficiency, and specialized tasks across AI applications.

Gemini 3.6 Flash offers 17% fewer output tokens than its 3.5 predecessor along with improved coding, general knowledge, multimodal, and computer-use abilities. DeepSWE coding test results for 3.6 Flash increased to 49% from 37%, and OSWorld-Verified rose to 83% from 78.4%. Computer-use functionality is now integrated. Pricing is set at $1.50 per million input tokens and $7.50 per million output tokens.

Gemini 3.5 Flash-Lite is positioned as the most economical 3.5 model, producing 350 output tokens per second at $0.30 per million inputs and $2.50 per million outputs.

Gemini 3.5 Flash Cyber focuses on cybersecurity, designed to identify and fix vulnerabilities. This model is available only to governments and trusted partners.
